$comment: Mobile Avatar Online Indicator Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Avatar Online Indicator — a circular green dot badge displayed at the bottom-right of the avatar container to signal that the user is currently online/active. Appears as a small solid circle with a white border ring that separates it visually from the avatar background. Figma Reference: Node ID 367-5165 (extracted from Avatar component, Status icon=Online indicator)

$component.name: Avatar Online Indicator
$component.description: A small green circular status badge anchored to the bottom-right corner of the avatar. The white border ring (1.5px) creates visual separation between the green dot and any avatar background color. Used exclusively as a sub-component of the Avatar — not rendered standalone.
$component.structure: Absolutely positioned square div, border-radius: full (renders as circle). Positioned at right: 0, vertically aligned to bottom-right of avatar container.

usage.contexts: Used inside Avatar component when statusIcon=Online indicator. Indicates the user is currently active/online.
usage.features: Single fixed size (14px), solid green fill, white border ring, absolute bottom-right positioning

size.description: Mobile avatar online indicator size - 14px (width and height, rendered as circle via border-radius: full)

radius.description: Mobile avatar online indicator border radius - fully circular (7px for 14px element = pill)

width.description: Mobile avatar online indicator border width - 1.5px white ring that separates the dot from the avatar background

color.description: Mobile avatar online indicator border color - white - #ffffff (creates visual separation from any avatar background)
Mobile avatar online indicator background color - success/500 green - #12b76a (indicates active/online status; raw value as success/500 is not a defined semantic token path)
